allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Item 'index copy.html' | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime; Get-Item 'index.html' | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime")

PowerShell($paths = @\('assets/img/icon.png','assets/img/apple-touch-icon.png','assets/img/profile-img.jpg','assets/img/images/web/hospital management system.png','assets/img/images/web/real estate website.png','assets/img/images/web/point of sale.png','assets/img/images/web/cake ordering system.png','assets/img/images/web/crime prediction.png','assets/img/images/web/online entrance exam.png','assets/img/images/app/taxi.png','assets/img/images/app/finlearn.png','assets/img/images/app/fish identification system.png','assets/img/testimonials/testimonials-1.jpg','assets/img/testimonials/testimonials-2.jpg','assets/img/testimonials/testimonials-3.jpg','assets/css/main.css','assets/js/script.js'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "OK: $p" } else { "MISSING: $p" } })

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content index.html | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Select-String -Path index.html -Pattern 'aos|bootstrap.min|swiper|isotope|glightbox|purecounter|typed\\.js|waypoints' -SimpleMatch | Measure-Object | Select-Object Count")
